email_body:
Beste Stan Janssen,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Performance Marketeer bij Cology Group. Uw oproep voor een leergierige, analytische marketeer die wil groeien in ads, data, SEO en tracking sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast pas ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toe om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik werk met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs, en ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden in betaalde advertenties en tracking verder te ontwikkelen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Cology Group is de kans om in een jong team te leren van ervaren specialisten, met veel variatie in klanten en campagnes. Ik neem graag verantwoordelijkheid, werk nauwkeurig en zoek steeds naar verbeterpunten.

Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop op een gesprek om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Stan Janssen,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Cology Group. Your call for a curious, analytical marketer who wants to grow in ads, data, SEO and tracking aligns perfectly with my profile.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I work with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush and Ahrefs, and I am motivated to further develop my skills in paid advertising and tracking.

What appeals to me about Cology Group is the opportunity to learn from experienced specialists in a young team, with variety in clients and campaigns. I take responsibility, work accurately, and always look for improvements.

I attach my CV and motivation letter. I hope to meet you for an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Stan Janssen,

Toen ik de vacature voor Performance Marketeer bij Cology Group las, voelde ik meteen een klik. U zoekt iemand die leergierig is, analytisch denkt, nauwkeurig werkt en energie krijgt van testen, meten en verbeteren — dat is precies hoe ik mijn werk aanpak.

Momenteel werk ik als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto, waar ik verantwoordelijk ben voor on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console, en gebruik die inzichten om campagnes en content te optimaliseren. Daarnaast werk ik aan mijn eigen project mirook.com, waar ik gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) toepas om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij een solide basis gegeven in data-gedreven marketing en technische SEO.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Cology Group is de focus op groei en leren in de praktijk. U biedt begeleiding door mensen die dagelijks met strategie, ads en klanten bezig zijn — precies wat ik nodig heb om mijn vaardigheden in performance marketing te verdiepen. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mij te specialiseren in ads, tracking en analytics, en ik durf vragen te stellen als ik iets niet weet. Ik neem verantwoordelijkheid voor mijn taken en zoek steeds naar manieren om resultaten te verbeteren.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1-niveau — ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn analytische instelling en leergierigheid een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team.

Ik hoop op een gesprek om mijn motivatie en ervaring verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Stan Janssen,

When I read the vacancy for Performance Marketeer at Cology Group, I immediately felt a connection. You are looking for someone who is eager to learn, analytical, accurate, and energized by testing, measuring, and improving — that is exactly how I approach my work.

Currently, I work as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, where I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console, and use those insights to optimize campaigns and content. Additionally, I work on my own project mirook.com, where I apply structured data, entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in AI search engines. This experience has given me a solid foundation in data-driven marketing and technical SEO.

What appeals to me about Cology Group is the focus on growth and learning in practice. You offer guidance from people who work daily with strategy, ads, and clients — exactly what I need to deepen my skills in performance marketing. I am motivated to specialize in ads, tracking, and analytics, and I am not afraid to ask questions when I don't know something. I take responsibility for my tasks and always look for ways to improve results.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level — I am currently taking classes to improve further. I am confident that with my analytical mindset and eagerness to learn, I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

I hope to meet you for an interview to further discuss my motivation and experience.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO & GEO experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data, entity optimization, and AI search visibility (mirook.com)
- Proficient in analytics tools: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- WordPress site building and content management (Elementor, Astra)
- Data-driven and analytical mindset, with a focus on testing, measuring, and improving
- Eager to learn and grow in performance marketing, with a technical foundation and B1 Dutch (actively improving)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in SEO, GEO, and web design, eager to grow in performance marketing. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads) and motivated to deepen skills in ads, tracking, and data-driven optimization. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
